page_title: National Mortgage Company real estate purchase loans
clean_text:
National Mortgage Company real estate purchase loans
Mortgage Loans for Purchase of Real Estate are provided from the funds of the “NATIONAL MORTGAGE COMPANY” RCO CJSC for the purchase of residential real estate on the territory of RA.
Business card
Currency: AMD
Minimum amount: 1,000,000 AMD
Duration of credit: 120-180 months
Annual interest rate: • Non-energy efficient loans 13.3–14.5%
• Energy efficient loans 12.8–14.0%
Surety: Residential real estate to be purchased, if required, also by other residential real estate, belonging to the applicant (co-borrower) and/or by guarantee.
Maximum amount: 35,000,000 AMD
Tab: Advantages
lending with a constant interest rate for 180 months,
loan provision with 10% down payment in case of an additional collateral of a residential real estate,
monthly commission fee and loan application review fee are not available.
Tab: Terms of provision
Non-energy efficient loans
Annual nominal interest rate (stable)
- 13.3–14.5%,
Annual actual interest rate (stable)
- 14.89–16.40%
Energy efficient loans
- 12.8–14.0%,
Annual actually interest rate (stable)
- 14.32-15.82%
Loan repayments
- monthly installments or installments of loan principal, each month envisaging partial repayments of interest amounts and loan
If necessity, a different schedule of interest and loan principal repayment can be set.
Down payment
- minimum advance payment is set to be at least 30% of the sale price of the purchased property
Minimum advance payment can be defined at 10% of the purchased residential real estate, if any of the following requirements is met:
in addition to the acquired residential real estate, other residential real estate is pledged as well;
the borrower provides insurance for a part of the specified advance payment. Advance payment insurance can be made up to a maximum of 20% of the value of the residential real estate;
Collateral - the acquired residential real estate, if necessary, also other residential real estate belonging to the applicant (co-borrower) and/or guarantee(s)
Commission - in the amount of 1% of the loan amount or 0%, instead 0.5% will be added to the nominal interest rate of the loan
Calculation of the interest amount - daily, on the decreasing balance of the loan
Loan-collateral ratio - the value of the loan-to-collateral ratio shall not exceed 70%.
The borrower (co-borrower) shall not have a current overdue liability, all existing credit liabilities shall be classified as standard, and the total number of overdue days for all loans over the past 12 months shall not exceed 30 calendar days.
Possible additional costs:
Loan Tariffs
Former conditions of loan tariffs
Tab: State support programs
The state support programs are:
Regional mortgage assistance program
Mortgage Repayment Assistance Program
Tab: To receive a loan
Required documents:
Identification documents of the applicant, co-owners of the purchased/pledged real estate;
Public service number or a reference on not receiving a public service number;
Marriage certificates (copies) of the applicant, co-owners of the purchased/pledged real estate, if they are married;
Birth certificate(s) (copies) of children (if available),
Employer reference of the applicant (other member(s) of the applicant's family, indicating the size of salary (income) (calculated over the last 12 months), position and length of service. The reference must at least contain the address of the place of employment, employer's name, TIN, telephone numbers, signature and stamp (if available) of the head of the organization, providing the reference;
Documents, evidencing other income of the applicant (lease, interest income from investments, etc.), as well as information on other expenses (e.g., alimony, care or other maintenance expenses);
If the applicant's employment is less than 12 months, information on previous employment (employer, position, job experience in each organization);
Certificate of Ownership (copy) of other purchased, offered for pledge property;
Reference from the passport department on the persons, registered in the purchased real estate;
The same documents relating to the applicant must also be submitted by the co-borrower (if co-borrower is available);
Document, evidencing the seller's acquisition of real estate ownership right;
Property valuation report by the certified independent valuator;
If the applicant has a business:
Copy of the charter, copy of the Certificate of State Registration of Legal Entities (with its inlays) or copy of reference, copy of TIN (as required),
License (in case of licensed activity);
Electronic Tax Office reports for the last 12 months (financial statements, income and expense reports (last 6 months), tax reports) and notice of receipt of reports.
1․ Documents are required, if the data or documents are missing or incorrect in the State Register database of the RA Ministry of Justice.
If the applicant has no account with the bank, it is required to submit also the documents (originals), required for opening an account with "ACBA-CREDIT AGRICOLE BANK" CJSC.
Tab: Useful information
The decision on the loan application is made and the customer shall be informed within 6 banking days after submitting the necessary documents,
In case of a positive decision to provide a loan, it is registered within a maximum of 2 banking days after the end of the pledge process.
Example of calculation of loan interest
Loan amount - 20,000,000 AMD
Loan interest rate - 13%
Loan term - 180 months
Commission - 1%
In this example, the monthly loan repayment* will be 233,638 AMD
Daily interest amount will make Loan amount (balance) × Loan interest rate ÷ 365 = (20,000,000×13%÷365) = 7,123.28 AMD.
* The repayment amount may vary depending on the number of days in a given month.
ATTENTION: LOAN INTEREST IS CALCULATED ON THE BASIS OF NOMINAL INTEREST RATE, AND THE ANNUAL INTEREST RATE SHOWS HOW MUCH THE LOAN WILL COST YOU, IN CASE OF DUE REPAYMENT OF LOAN INETERST AMOUNTS AND ALL MANDATORY FEES FOR LOAN PROVISION AND SERVICE. YOU CAN FIND THE ACTUAL INTEREST RATE CALCULATION
HERE
Find out more
In case the borrower does not fulfill their obligations on time, a penalty of 0.13% is calculated for each overdue day (
applicable fines
Loan repayments are carried out in the following order (in case of overdue obligations):
Fine/penalty
Interest amount
Loan principal amount.
Insurance companies cooperating with the bank
Rosgosstrakh-Armenia
(address: 1 Northern Ave., Yerevan, tel.: (374) 10 59 10 10)
Ingo Armenia
(address: 51, 52 Hanrapetutyan Str, areas 47, 48, 50, Yerevan; tel.: (374) 10 59 21 21)
Nairi Insurance
(address: 10 Vazgen Sargsyan str., area 110, 0010, Yerevan, RA; tel.: (374) 60 50 00 60)
Qualified independent appraisal companies cooperating with the bank.
National Mortgage Loan Information Summary.
Tab: Important to know
Mortgage loans for purchase of real estate are provided to resident individuals over 18 years of age, who will not reach the pension age +4 years during the loan validity. Only the applicant's spouse, the applicant's and her spouse's parents, sisters and brothers can be the co-borrowers. The co-borrower must be a resident of the Republic of Armenia. Co-borrowers bear the same responsibilities as the borrower under the loan liabilities.
Loan is provided in a non-cash form;
Factors for a positive loan decision are customer credit rating;
Factors for rejection of loan: insufficient financial performance as a result of the analysis, bad credit history of the customer, insufficiency/lack of required collateral, professional opinion of the Business Advisor, professional opinion of the Credit Committee;
The loan is registered in the Bank's branches;
If the borrower's income is insufficient to obtain the loan, there may be co-borrowers;
During the loan validity, insurance is made for the borrower(s) (co-borrower(s)) against accidents, as well as purchased real estate, being the security for the loan, on an annual basis. Insurance is carried out at the residual amount of the loan through an insurance company, acceptable to the borrower and on terms, acceptable to the creditor;
The valuation of the purchased/pledged real estate is carried out by a qualified independent valuator, cooperating with the Bank;
In case of overdue loan repayment of more than 90 days and failure to repay the annual insurance on time, the loan is considered to be non-classified, and the interest rate may be reviewed and set at the current interest rate of mortgage loan market;
Collateral agreements, being security for mortgage loans, shall by verified by the notary, and the pledge right, arising from these agreements, is subject to state registration;
The Bank is obliged to provide the consumer with a contract proposal 7 days in advance and allow 7 days for consideration;
The bank statements during the agreement validity are provided 20 business days before each repayment, specified by the schedule, in the communication method, preferred by the customer;
Upon request, provision of loan information in a format of a reference during the business day of submission of application – 5000 AMD, during the following business days – 3000 AMD.
YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO COMMUNICATE WITH YOUR FINANCIAL ORGANIZATION IN YOUR PREFERRED METHOD - BY MAIL OR EMAIL. RECEIPT OF INFORMATION ELECTRONICALY IS THE MOST CONVENIENT. IT IS AVAILABLE 24/7, FREE OF THE RISK OF LOSS OF PAPER INFORMATION AND PROVIDES CONFIDENTIALITY.
ATTENTION: APPLYING FOR A LOAN, THE BANK WILL PROVIDE YOU, YOUR GUARANTORS (IF AVAILABLE) WITH AN INDIVIDUAL SHEET OF SIGNIFICANT TERMS OF MORTGAGE LOAN, WHERE THE INDIVIDUAL TERMS OF LOAN, PROVIDED TO YOU, WILL BE PRESENTED.
For lending, the following payments may be made by the consumer:
Real estate valuation fee – 5,000 AMD or more, depending on the property surface and type
Notary service fee - 3,000 - 15,000 AMD
Fee for registration of certificate of real estate collateral right - 2,000-25,000 AMD
Joint reference (on real estate restrictions) fee - 10,000 AMD
Property and accident insurance payments - 0.15% or 0.16% of loan residual value.
The evaluated amount of purchased property is the insurance amount of the real estate, being the collateral.
Prepayment insurance fee - 2% or 3% of the residual value of the insured advance payment
Fees, related to pledge of other property - 2,000-10,000 AMD.
All payments are included in the actual interest rate calculation.
The loan can be repaid (fully or partially) earlier than the contract term, in which case the customer pays the interest amount, calculated for the actual loan term, as well as a lump sum penalty in the following size:
In case of early repayment during the first year - 0.6% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year;
In case of early repayment during the second year - 0.4% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year;
• In case of early repayment during the third year - 0.2% of the loan amount, repaid in excess for the loan principal, subject to repayment, over the specified contractual year, and in case of early repayment during the remaining period of the contract, no penalty will be charged.
Contractual year is considered to be each period of 12 months, following the agreement date.
Confiscation of collateral
THE PLEDGED PROPERTY CAN BE CONFISCATED, IF THE BORROWER DOES NOT DULY REPAY THE INTEREST AMOUNTS AND LOAN AMOUNT. IF THE COLLATERAL VALUE IS INSUFFICIENT, THE BORROWER’S LIABILITIES WILL BE REPAID AT THE EXPENSE OF OTHER PROPERTY OF THE BORROWER.
Information, provided to the Credit Registry
INFORMATION ABOUT THE LOAN WILL BE REGISTERED IN THE CREDIT REGISTRY, IF THE BORROWER FAILS TO DULY REPAY THE INTERST AMOUNT AND LOAN AMOUNT.
HAVING A NEGATIVE CREDIT HISTORY MAY BE AN OBSTACLE FOR YOU TO RECEIVE ANOTHER LOAN IN THE FUTURE.
FOR GUARANTORS
Please be informed that:
If the borrower fails to perform their liabilities, you will pay for it instead, your credit history will be impaired, and your property will be confiscated.
You will be provided with the copies of the loan agreement, guarantee agreement and repayment schedule.
The communication will be performed in the way, preferred by you.
You will be notified 7 days in advance of a change in the terms of the contract.
A reminder of the current liability will be sent to you 1 day in advance.
In case of delay of loan repayment, you will be notified at the latest one day later.
THE GUARANTOR HAS THE RIGHT TO:
Request from the creditor the information on the loan balance at any time.
Receive the money, paid by you for the loan, from the borrower, as well as other losses incurred by you instead of the borrower.
Financial assistant

ATTENTION: "YOUR FINANCIAL DIRECTORY" IS THE ELECTRONIC SYSTEM FOR SEARCH, COMPARISON OF SERVICES, OFFERED TO INDIVIDUALS, AND MAKING THE SELECTION OF THE MOST EFFICIENT OPTIONS FOR YOU EASIER.
